# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: request-processing-filter
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: my-service
  filters:
    - name: request-processing-filter
      typed_config:
        '@type': type.googleapis.com/udpa.types.TypedStruct
        value:
          filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.http.lua
              typed_config:
                '@type': type.googleapis.com/udpa.types.TypedStruct
                value:
                  inline_code: |
                    -- Request processing logic here

            - name: envoy.filters.http.router
              typed_config:
                '@type': type.googleapis.com/udpa.types.TypedStruct
                value:
                  route_config:
                    virtual_hosts:
                      - name: default
                        routes:
                          - match: { prefix: "/" }
                            route: { cluster: my-backend }

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: retry-and-timeout
spec:
  host: my-backend
  trafficPolicy:
    retryPolicy:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 2s
    connectionPool:
      maxConnections: 100
      maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
